response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with strong fundamentals in testing, TDD, and craftsmanship, plus exposure to high-throughput systems at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, or telemetry/metrics infrastructure at the scale this Principal/IC6 role demands. Title progression (Senior/Staff) and breadth suggest capability, but the specific growth/experimentation systems domain is a significant gap for a principal-level hire.
strengths: 13+ years across web, backend, embedded with high-throughput systems experience (millions of req/s at Sociomantic)
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tools authorship (Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Polyglot proficiency in JS/TS, Python-adjacent stacks, C/C++, Java, D — matches required language list
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout automation
Lacks evidence of metrics/telemetry infrastructure or statistical analysis work central to this role
Principal/IC6 scope typically requires cross-org platform leadership; resume shows team-level impact, not multi-team platform ownership

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and high-scale systems background
Insufficient evidence of principal-level multi-team platform leadership
